["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","blockquote",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Alpine Linux is a security-oriented, lightweight Linux distribution based on musl libc and busybox."}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Alpine Linux 是一个面向安全，轻量级的基于 musl libc 与 busybox 项目的 Linux 发行版。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"在终端输入以下命令以替换镜像源："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["也可以直接编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apk/repositories"}]," 文件。以下是 v3.5 版本的参考配置："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apk/repositories","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["也可以使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"latest-stable"}]," 指向最新的稳定版本："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","filepath":"/etc/apk/repositories","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["更改完 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apk/repositories"}]," 文件后请更新索引以使更改生效："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
